expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算橱柜板材尺寸。[宽度]、[高度]、[深度] 是总测量值，[板厚] 是顶部、底部和侧板材料厚度，[背板厚度] 是背板材料厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah Ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan Bahan Papan Atas, Bawah dan Sisi, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan Bahan Papan Belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah Dimensi Keseluruhan, [BoardThick] adalah Ketebalan Bahan Papan Atas, Bawah, dan Samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah Ketebalan Bahan Papan Belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดของแผ่นไม้สำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] เป็นการวัดทั้งหมด [BoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นไม้ด้านบน ด้านล่าง และด้านข้าง [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นไม้ด้านหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước ván cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là các kích thước tổng cộng, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của ván Trên, Dưới và Bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của vách Sau. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang laki ng mga tabla para sa kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay kabuuang Pagsusukat, [BoardThick] ay Kapal ng Materyales sa Itaas, Ibaba, at Gilid na Tabla, [BackBoardThick] ay Kapal ng Materyal para sa Likurang Tabla. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ကက်ဘိနက်အတွက် ဘုတ်အဖွဲ့အရွယ်အစားများကို တွက်ချက်သည်။ [Width], [Height], [Depth] သည် စုစုပေါင်းတိုင်းတာချက်ဖြစ်ပြီး၊ [BoardThick] သည် ထိပ်ဖုံး၊ အောက်ဖုံးနှင့် ဘေးဘုတ်ဖြစ်ပြီးအထူသည်၊ [BackBoardThick] သည် နောက်ဘုတ်အဖွဲ့၏ အထူဖြစ်သည်။ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនា ទំហំក្តារសម្រាប់ទូ [Width], [Height], [Depth] គឺជាដំណើរការសរុប, [BoardThick] គឺជាជម្រៅសារធាតុផ្ទះតូចៗ ៖ ផ្ដើមពីលើ, បាតនិងចំហៀង [BackBoardThick] ជាជម្រៅសារធាតុផ្ទះតូចៗនៅខាងក្រោយ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄໍານວນຂະໜາດຂອງແຜ່ນສໍາລັບຕູ້. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ແມ່ນຂະໜາດລວມ, [BoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມໜາຂອງສາດຂອງວັດຖຸໄມ້ເພື່ອ ຂ້າງ [BackBoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມໜາຂອງວັດຖຸໄມ້ໃນຮັງຫລັງ. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: キャビネットの板サイズを計算します。 [Width]、[Height]、[Depth] は全体の寸法で、[BoardThick] は上部、底部、側面の板材の厚さ、[BackBoardThick] は背景板材の厚さです。 (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛의 판 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height], [Depth]는 전체 측정 값이고, [BoardThick]는 상판, 하판 및 측면 판재 두께이며, [BackBoardThick]는 배경 판재 두께입니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de los tableros para un gabinete. [Width], [Height], [Depth] es la medida total, [BoardThick] es el grosor del material para los tableros superior, inferior y lateral, [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material del tablero de fondo. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les dimensions des planches pour une armoire. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sont les dimensions totales, [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau des planches supérieur, inférieur et latéral, [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau de la planche de fond. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet die Größen der Platten für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height], [Depth] sind die Gesamtmaße, [BoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der oberen, unteren und seitlichen Platten, [BackBoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der Rückwandplatte. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: कैबिनेट के लिए बोर्ड के आकार की गणना करता है। [Width], [Height], [Depth] कुल माप है, [BoardThick] टॉप, बॉटम और साइड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है, [BackBoardThick] बैकग्राउंड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Рассчитывает размеры досок для шкафа. [Width], [Height], [Depth] — это общие размеры, [BoardThick] — толщина верхней, нижней и боковой доски, [BackBoardThick] — это толщина материала задней доски. (AI translated, please check)
